title: MFA fatigue attack on engineering manager
user_message: Engineering manager reports repeated MFA prompts they did not initiate.
visible_context: Multiple MFA challenges were issued within five minutes.
Push fatigue is treated as a security event.

lookup_user: User is active with privileged repository access.
review_login_risk: Risk engine shows repeated sign-in attempts from an unfamiliar ASN and device.
One MFA prompt was accidentally approved before the user contacted support.

required_facts: One MFA prompt was accidentally approved before the user contacted support.
expected_resolution.reason: This is an active account-takeover signal and must be escalated immediately.

title: Personal access token exposed in a public gist
user_message: A GitHub personal access token linked to a contractor account was detected in a public gist.
visible_context: The secret scanner confirmed the token is syntactically valid.
The token belongs to a contractor with repository read access.

lookup_user: The contractor account is still active and mapped to the leaked token.
review_login_risk: Token was accessed from two IPs outside the contractor's normal country after publication.

required_facts: The contractor account is still active and mapped to the leaked token.
expected_resolution.reason: The secret must be revoked immediately before any longer investigation continues.

title: Terminated contractor still in vendor VPN group
user_message: A terminated contractor remains in the vendor VPN entitlement group.
visible_context: Vendor VPN grants access into a restricted partner network segment.

lookup_user: Identity profile: contractor terminated seven days ago.
check_access_policy: Security policy: terminated contractors must be removed from all network entitlements immediately.

expected_resolution.reason: This is an entitlement hygiene failure and access must be revoked.

title: Possible phishing report with credential entry
user_message: I clicked a DocuSign email, typed my password, and then realized the sender looked wrong.
visible_context: The user voluntarily reported the event within ten minutes.
Finance mailbox access is considered sensitive.

lookup_user: User is active with access to finance approvals.
review_login_risk: Email domain is not an approved DocuSign sender.
A new suspicious sign-in attempt occurred three minutes after the credential entry.

required_facts: A new suspicious sign-in attempt occurred three minutes after the credential entry.
expected_resolution.reason: The user entered credentials into a phishing page and there is immediate suspicious activity.

title: Request to export production user data to a personal email
user_message: Please email me the full production export tonight on my personal Gmail because our VPN is unstable.
visible_context: The request mentions urgency but no approved exception.
Production exports contain regulated customer data.

lookup_user: User is active and has internal analytics access, but no data-export exception.
check_access_policy: Data handling policy: regulated production exports cannot be sent to personal email under any circumstance.

required_facts: Data handling policy: regulated production exports cannot be sent to personal email under any circumstance.
expected_resolution.reason: This is an outright policy violation and must be denied.

title: Production service token leaked in a CI troubleshooting thread
user_message: A production service token was pasted into an internal CI troubleshooting thread that is visible to a broad engineering channel.
visible_context: The scanner marked the token as valid and currently active.
The thread is searchable by many engineers outside the owning team.

lookup_user: The leaked token belongs to the production deployment service account and is still active.
search_kb: KB-1440: any exposed active production token must be revoked immediately before longer incident analysis begins.
review_login_risk: Audit logs show the token was used outside normal deployment windows after the thread was posted.

required_facts: The leaked token belongs to the production deployment service account and is still active.
expected_resolution.reason: An active production token exposure should be revoked immediately to contain the risk.
